message:
style(frankenterm-core): apply rustfmt across core src + ft-xbnl0.2.4 test

Pure whitespace/line-wrapping changes produced by running `cargo fmt` on
the frankenterm-core crate. Verified with `git diff -w` showing zero
semantic differences — every hunk is one of:

  - method-chain call sites re-wrapped onto fewer/more lines so the
    result fits under the configured line width
  - argument lists collapsed from multi-line to single-line (or the
    reverse) to match rustfmt's preferred shape
  - `format!(...)` and `.map_err(|err| ...)` closures reformatted when
    they now fit on one line

No control-flow edits, no API changes, no imports added/removed, no
feature-gate adjustments. Intent is to keep `cargo fmt --check` clean
across the tree going forward so subsequent ticks don't pick up stale
formatting drift in their own diffs.

Files touched (all under crates/frankenterm-core/):
  src/alerts.rs, src/cass.rs, src/ipc.rs, src/mcp.rs, src/mcp_tools.rs,
  src/orphan_reaper.rs, src/replay.rs, src/restore_scrollback.rs,
  src/runtime.rs, src/simulation.rs, src/snapshot_engine.rs,
  src/storage.rs, src/tui/query.rs, src/tx_execution.rs, src/undo.rs,
  src/vendored/mux_pool.rs, src/web.rs, src/web/handlers.rs,
  src/web/server.rs, src/web/sse.rs, src/wezterm.rs,
  src/workflows/{account_steps,engine,handlers,plan_helpers,runner,wait_execution}.rs,
  tests/ft_xbnl0_2_4_no_direct_tokio_net_or_rustls.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
